name: In-Run Data Shapley for Adam Optimizer

description: arXiv:2602.00329v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Reliable data attribution is essential for mitigating bias and reducing computational waste in modern machine learning, with the Shapley value serving as the theoretical gold standard. While recent "In-Run" methods bypass the prohibitive cost of retraining by estimating contributions dynamically, they heavily rely on the linear structure...
author: Meng Ding, Zeqing Zhang, Di Wang, Lijie Hu
